languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"

languages.text: "Хм..." {n}Тразин окидывает вас и ваше оружие небрежным взглядом.{/n} "Типичный представитель своего вида — способность приходить даже к простым логическим выводам ограниченна. Упрощу вводные для твоего понимания: ты хочешь такого же обращения, какое получил твой собрат?"

"Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"

"Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"

languages.text: 「うーん…」{n}トラザインはあなたとあなたの武器をざっと見た。{/n}「あなたの仲間の典型的な例だね。最も単純な論理的結論さえ導き出す能力は限られている。わかりやすく説明しよう。仲間と同じように扱われることを望んでいるか？」
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you yearn for the same treatment your fellow received?"

traits.locale_text: 「うーん…」{n}トラズンはあなたとあなたの武器をざっと見た。「あなたの仲間の典型的な例ですね。最も単純な論理的結論さえ導き出す能力は限られています。わかりやすく説明しましょう。仲間と同じように扱われることを望んでいますか？」

languages.text: “嗯……”{n}特拉金随意地瞥了眼你和你的武器。{/n}“连最简单的逻辑都理不清，是你们这个物种的通病。那我就把话说得简单点，好让你也能听懂：你也希望得到和你同伴一样的待遇吗？”
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"

traits.locale_text: “嗯……”{n}特拉金随意地瞥了眼你和你的武器。{/n}“连最简单的逻辑都理不清，是你们这个物种的通病。那我就把话说得简单点，好让你也能听懂：你也希望得到和你同伴一样的待遇吗？”

languages.text: «Mmm...». {n}Trazyn os dedica una mirada somera a ti y a tu arma.{/n} «Un espécimen típico de tu especie; tu capacidad para llegar incluso a la conclusión lógica más sencilla es limitada. Utilizaré palabras más simples para que puedas comprenderlas: ¿ansías el mismo trato que ha recibido tu semejante?».
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"

traits.locale_text: «Mmm...». {n}Trazyn os dedica una mirada somera a ti y a tu arma.{/n} «Un espécimen típico de tu especie; tu capacidad para llegar incluso a la conclusión lógica más sencilla es limitada. Utilizaré palabras más simples para que puedas comprenderlas: ¿ansías el mismo trato que ha recibido tu semejante?».

languages.text: "Hmm ..." {n}Trazyn wirft einen flüchtigen Blick auf deine Waffe.{/n} "{mf|Ein typischer Vertreter|Eine typische Vertreterin} deiner Art ... nicht einmal die simpelsten logischen Schlüsse kannst du ziehen. Ich werde versuchen, mich einfach auszudrücken, damit du mich verstehst: Wünscht du dir dieselbe Behandlung, die dein Mitstreiter erfahren hat?"
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ..." {n}Trazyn wirft einen flüchtigen Blick auf deine Waffe.{/n} "{mf|Ein typischer Vertreter|Eine typische Vertreterin} deiner Art ... nicht einmal die simpelsten logischen Schlüsse kannst du ziehen. Ich werde versuchen, mich einfach auszudrücken, damit du mich verstehst: Wünscht du dir dieselbe Behandlung, die dein Mitstreiter erfahren hat?"

languages.text: {n}Trazyn vous jauge rapidement du regard, vous et votre arme.{/n} « Hmm... Comme il est typique de votre espèce, vous avez toutes les peines du monde à tirer les plus simples conclusions logiques. Laissez-moi reformuler d'une manière que vous devriez comprendre : souhaitez-vous subir le même sort que votre semblable ? »
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn vous jauge rapidement du regard, vous et votre arme.{/n} « Hmm... Comme il est typique de votre espèce, vous avez toutes les peines du monde à tirer les plus simples conclusions logiques. Laissez-moi reformuler d'une manière que vous devriez comprendre : souhaitez-vous subir le même sort que votre semblable ? »

languages.text: "Ya..." {n}Trazyn, sana ve silahına üstünkörü bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Türünüzün tipik bir örneği. En basit mantıksal sonuçları çıkarma yeteneğiniz bile sınırlı. Anlayabilmeniz için şartları basitleştireceğim: Yoldaşınızın gördüğü muamelenin aynısını mı istiyorsunuz?"
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}Trazyn gives you and your weapon a cursory look.{/n} "A typical specimen of your kind — your ability to draw even the simplest logical conclusions is limited. I will simplify the terms so that you might understand: do you wish for the same treatment your fellow received?"
